name: Alliance Developpement Capital SIIC
summary: Alliance Developpement Capital SIIC (ADC SIIC) is a publicly owned real estate investment firm. The firm specializes in owning and managing residential real estate properties. It primarily invests in properties in Paris and its suburbs. The firm was formerly known as AD Capital SA. Alliance Developpement Capital is based in Saint-Josse-Ten-Noode, Belgium.
